title: Disposition of remaining sets
doc_html:
§208.  Disposition of remaining sets

The secretary of state may sell to the general public all sets in excess of the distribution provided in R.S. 24:206 at a reasonable price not to exceed twenty percent advance on the original cost.  

Added by Acts 1954, No. 50, §1.
doc_text:
§208.  Disposition of remaining sets
The secretary of state may sell to the general public all sets in excess of the distribution provided in R.S. 24:206 at a reasonable price not to exceed twenty percent advance on the original cost.
Added by Acts 1954, No. 50, §1.
